name: wda-control-panel
description: All-in-one Windows panel for managing 20+ iPhones via bundled go-ios + WebDriverAgent.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/fleet-agent.js && node --check src/wda-launcher.js && node --check src/macos-launcher.js && node --check src/automation-worker.js && node --check src/device-store.js && node --check src/renderer.js && node --check src/paths.js && node --check src/setup-helper.js && node --check scripts/fetch-go-ios.js
